headline: Mac Allister
body: Iraola wants Mac Allister and Alisson to stay with Reds. Liverpool boss Andoni Iraola wants midfielder Alexis Mac Allister and goalkeeper Alisson to remain at the club.
raw_text: Iraola wants Mac Allister and Alisson to stay with Reds. Liverpool boss Andoni Iraola wants midfielder Alexis Mac Allister and goalkeeper Alisson to remain at the club.
